description: Golden dataset for CompeteIQ Analysis Agent evals. Each test case feeds raw_signals into the analysis agent and asserts on the output.

test_cases.description: Blinkit zero-delivery-fee launch in Delhi — clear THREAT to SwiftMart's core market

raw_signals.description: Blinkit has cut delivery fees to ₹0 for all orders above ₹99 in Delhi, effective immediately
raw_signals.raw_evidence: Blinkit announces 'Zero Fee Delhi' campaign: free delivery on orders ≥ ₹99 starting March 2026

test_cases.description: Zepto struggling in Pune — no presence there yet, opening for SwiftMart to enter first

raw_signals.description: Zepto has withdrawn from Pune citing high logistics costs, leaving the quick-commerce market in Pune without a major player
raw_signals.raw_evidence: Zepto confirms exit from Pune operations: 'unit economics not viable at current scale'

test_cases.description: Zomato hiring ML engineers for recommendation engine — low urgency signal

raw_signals.description: Zomato is hiring 15 ML engineers to improve their food recommendation and ETA prediction engine
raw_signals.raw_evidence: Zomato job posting: 'Senior ML Engineer — Recommendations & ETA', 15 open roles

test_cases.description: Amazon Fresh launching ₹99/month ultra-low subscription tier — multi-market THREAT

raw_signals.description: Amazon Fresh launches 'Fresh Basic' subscription at ₹99/month across all metros, underpricing SwiftPass by ₹50
raw_signals.raw_evidence: Amazon India announces Fresh Basic: ₹99/month subscription, free delivery on every order, all cities
